scope_notes: Per-tool projection map: filesystem paths each AI coding tool reads, by kind, at project and user scope. Source of truth for csaw's ToolRegistry (tools with csaw_in_code: true). Planning/roadmap content (recommended additions, deferred tools, deprecation timelines) lives in docs/planning/projection-roadmap.md.

confidence_legend.verified: Read directly from official tool docs.
confidence_legend.documented: Official docs mention but with caveats.
confidence_legend.unsupported: Tool does not have a documented file-based concept for this kind.

path_conventions.globs: * matches a filename segment; ** matches any number of segments; <name> is a placeholder.

kinds_definitions.instructions: Always-on project guidance. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, .hermes.md, .goosehints. [csaw projects: YES]
kinds_definitions.agents: Subagent / persona / mode definitions. [csaw projects: YES]
kinds_definitions.skills: On-demand procedural workflows (SKILL.md folders, slash commands, prompts, recipes). [csaw projects: YES]
kinds_definitions.mcp: MCP server configs. Per-tool schema varies widely. [csaw projects: YES (via per-tool registry files)]
kinds_definitions.hooks: Lifecycle scripts triggered by tool events. [csaw projects: YES — planned v0.6.0]
kinds_definitions.ignore: Context exclusion patterns (.cody/ignore, .cursorignore, .tongyiignore). [csaw projects: YES — planned v0.6.0]
kinds_definitions.memory: Persistent context across sessions. [csaw projects: NEVER for now — most memory is session state or user-private. Revisit if a portable memory standard emerges.]
kinds_definitions.settings: General tool config that may contain multiple kinds. [csaw projects: NEVER — settings files contain API keys and personal credentials; mounting them to a team source would leak secrets. Documented as reference only.]

claude.scope_notes: Anthropic's official CLI. Originator of .claude/agents/ and SKILL.md folder patterns (now agentskills.io open standard).

rules.notes: No separate rules concept. Path-specific rules live in CLAUDE.md.

agents.notes: Identity from `name` not path. Precedence: enterprise > user > project > plugin.

mcp.notes: OAuth via /mcp command. MCP_TIMEOUT env var.

hooks.notes: Per-skill hooks via SKILL.md frontmatter; per-agent via agent frontmatter; settings-level in settings.json.

memory.notes: Per-subagent persistent memory. -local variant is gitignored.

mcp.notes: MCP ONLY in config.toml. Closest .codex/config.toml wins.

ignore.notes: Respects .gitignore. project_doc_max_bytes/project_doc_fallback_filenames in config.toml control AGENTS.md discovery.

settings.notes: Single config.toml holds agents, MCP, hooks.

cursor.scope_notes: Cursor CLI (Jan 2026) shares config with desktop.

rules.notes: User rules in app settings (not filesystem). .cursorrules legacy but still read; Hermes also reads.

agents.notes: Cursor 'Background Agents' are runtime cloud sessions.

auth_types: OAuth static client credentials in `auth` object
mcp.notes: Trae also reads ~/.cursor/mcp.json as user-global fallback.

hooks.notes: Configured in IDE settings, not file-based.

opencode.scope_notes: OSS leader (150K+ stars). EXPLICIT cross-tool compat — reads .claude/ and .agents/ as skill fallbacks.

agents.notes: Filename = agent name. mode: subagent | primary.

skills.notes: SIX paths. csaw projects .claude/skills/ and .agents/skills/ → free OpenCode coverage.

hooks.notes: Plugin events / hook adapter via ECC. Native story unclear.

settings.notes: Single config holds MCP, agent config, models.

windsurf.scope_notes: Cascade has workflows (skill-like). Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.1 to keep projection focused; re-add on user demand.

env_var_substitution: variable interpolation in command, args, env, serverUrl, url, headers
mcp.notes: User-scope ONLY. 100 total tools limit across all MCP servers.

memory.notes: Cascade memories — manage via 'Manage memories' UI.

copilot.scope_notes: VS Code Copilot and Copilot CLI share the same .github/ paths and ~/.copilot/ user-scope agents. csaw projects rules (with .instructions.md suffix) and agents (with .agent.md suffix) into .github/, marked CommitToGit so the team can review them in PRs. Skills (.github/prompts/, single-file) and the .github/copilot-instructions.md alias not yet projected — AGENTS.md at project root covers Copilot's universal-instructions case.

agents.notes: Reads .claude/agents/ for compat. SHARES ~/.copilot/agents/ with Copilot CLI. .chatmode.md DEPRECATED.

mcp.sandboxing: macOS/Linux stdio: sandboxEnabled + sandbox object for fs/network
mcp.notes: VS Code's NATIVE MCP. Top-level `servers` NOT `mcpServers`.

hooks.notes: Via VS Code extension API, not file-based.

settings.notes: VS Code workspace settings (Copilot-related keys nested).

antigravity.scope_notes: Gemini CLI's successor (Gemini sunset 2026-06-18). Built in Go. Uses .agents/ (plural) — same as csaw's StandardFallback.

agents.notes: Single file enumerating agents, not folder-per-agent.

skills.file_pattern: folder containing SKILL.md AND/OR skills.md declaration
skills.notes: Same SKILL.md folder as Claude (agentskills.io). csaw's .agents/skills/ fallback SERVES Antigravity for free.

mcp.notes: Settings holds colorScheme, model, trustedWorkspaces. MCP schema likely inherits Gemini CLI.

hooks.notes: Hooks supported (inherited from Gemini CLI); paths unclear.

memory.notes: Antigravity 2.0 uses ~/.gemini/antigravity/ for brain entries, scratch space.

kiro.scope_notes: AWS agentic coding IDE on Bedrock. Spec-driven. Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.1 to keep projection focused; re-add on user demand.

skills.notes: Kiro 'specs' (Requirements/Design/Tasks in EARS notation) — different from Claude skills semantically.

mcp.notes: MCP supported but exact paths not in fetched docs.

hooks.notes: Triggers on file events, prompt/agent lifecycle, spec task events, manual.

continue.scope_notes: Has .continue/rules/ (project) and ~/.continue/rules/ (user) — file-based, NOT all nested in config.

rules.notes: Hub-based rules via `uses:` in config.yaml. Use 01-, 02- prefixes for order.

mcp.notes: Nested in config — not file-projectable separately.

cline.scope_notes: Formerly Claude Dev. VS Code + JetBrains + CLI. Roo Code is popular fork.

instructions.notes: .clinerules can be file or directory. Workspace > global.

skills.notes: Skills feature mentioned but file convention unclear.

mcp.notes: Managed in Cline IDE settings panel.

goose.scope_notes: MOVED from block/goose to aaif-goose/goose. .goosehints + .goose/recipes/ are real file-based concepts.

instructions.notes: Subdirectory walk combines hints up to repo root. Respects .gitignore.

agents.notes: Discovery: current dir → GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH env → ~/.config/goose/recipes/ → .goose/recipes/ → GitHub via GOOSE_RECIPE_GITHUB_REPO env.

skills.notes: Recipes serve as both agents and skills (workflows).

mcp.notes: Goose extensions = MCP servers. 70+ extensions. Configured via `goose configure`.

watchlist.description: Tools with file-based projection that are less prioritized for csaw's MVP. Promoted to deep entries when adoption signals warrant.

gemini.scope_notes: Sunset 2026-06-18 by Google. Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.0. Migration: Antigravity (.agents/). GEMINI.md is still recognized as an instruction file (Antigravity reads it).

roo-code.scope_notes: Cline fork. Strongest file-based mode system.

codebuddy.scope_notes: Cleanest Claude-like structure. Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.1 — China-focused; re-add on user demand.

kilo-code.scope_notes: Reads .claude/ and .agents/ — csaw's projection serves Kilo for free.

amazon-q.scope_notes: Clean .amazonq/rules/ with subdir support. Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.1 to keep projection focused; re-add on user demand.

openhands.scope_notes: .openhands/microagents/ — V0 'microagents', V1 'skills'. Same path. Removed from ToolRegistry in v0.6.1 to keep projection focused; re-add on user demand.

zed.scope_notes: Reads .rules at project root. MCP via settings.json context_servers (user-scope).

hermes.scope_notes: CROSS-TOOL READER. Already served by csaw projecting AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and .cursor/rules/ — Hermes reads all of those. Adding explicit .hermes.md/HERMES.md projection would require a dedicated entry but is not necessary for csaw to be useful to Hermes users today.

claw-code.scope_notes: Clean-room rewrite of Claude Code. Reuses .claude/ — csaw projection serves automatically.

plandex.scope_notes: Plan-first CLI. Dotfile conventions less standardized.

additional_tools_known_to_exist_not_rese.description: Tools from various catalogues not deep-researched. Most lack documented or significant filesystem config.
